brief_notes: Cerebellar learning paper (L7-Fmr1 KO, VOR, diazepam). Extensive data (37 stat sentences in extraction). Key p-values and parameters verified: 1 Hz ±10°/s vestibular, 30 min training, p=7.37x10^-4, p=3.47x10^-5, p=1.10x10^-5, diazepam 0.5 mg/kg IP, 18-24 hours before training, L7-Fmr1 KO rescue after diazepam, OKR adaptation results. 6 figures, 1 table. 17 citations somewhat light but writing is solid.
